creator: billsf@cuba.calyx.nl
text:
fetch(1) will not download speex-1.2beta2.tar.gz

Fix: 

WORKAROUND: Use lynx(1) to download the file from:      
        http://downloads.xiph.org/releases/speex/speex-1.2beta2.tar.gz
        NOTE: This appears to only work with www/lynx-ssl
How-To-Repeat:         use ${PORTS}/audio/speex -- fails, has failed for about a week
